zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Smith於1667年9月17日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓時，她的父親Richard Smith23歲，母親Sarah Chandler23歲。她於1689年5月29日與Robert Moulton Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1737年9月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓享年69歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Smith于1667年9月17日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓时，她的父亲Richard Smith23岁，母亲Sarah Chandler23岁。她于1689年5月29日与Robert Moulton Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1737年9月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓享年69岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Smith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

variants.name: Smither
meanings: English (Surrey): occupational name from Middle English smith(i)ere, smeth(i)ere ‘blacksmith’, a derivative of Middle English smithen, smethen, ‘to make (something) in metal, to forge’. Compare Smith .

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

variants.name: Smyth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ronan, Aidan, Brigid, Conor, Eoin, Malachy, Paddy.
English: variant of   Smith  . This form of the surname is particularly common Ireland.

variants.name: McGowan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Siobhan, Cormac, Seamus, Aileen, Colm, Eithne, Kieran, Niall, Paddy.

Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (a') Ghobhainn or Mac Gobhann (Scottish) or Mac (an) Ghabhann (Irish), ‘son of (the) smith’. This name has also been Anglicized as Smith and Smithson .

variants.name: Smead
meanings: occupational name from Middle English smeth(e) ‘smith’, a phonetic variant of Smith 1 that was widespread in medieval England, especially in south-eastern and south-western counties.

topographic, occupational, and habitational name from Middle English smethe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smethe), a side form of Smith 2, for someone who lived and worked at a blacksmith's, or who lived in or came from a place so named, such as Smeeth (Kent) or Smeed Farm in Hastingleigh (Kent). Compare the synonymous Smithey .

variants.name: Faber
meanings: German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), and Danish; Slovak and Czech (mainly Fáber): occupational name from Latin faber ‘blacksmith’. At the time of the Reformation, it was much used as a humanistic name, a translation into Latin of vernacular surnames such as German Schmidt and Dutch Smit . Compare Fabri and Fauber .

History: In North America, this surname was originally also part of a title. It was François Lefebvre, sieur Duplessis Faber from Paris, France, whose title sieur Duplessis Faber was shortened into the surname Faber. He married Marie-Madeleine Chorel in Champlain, QC, in 1689.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Smith was born on 17 September 1667, in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Richard Smith, was 23 and her mother, Sarah Chandler, was 23. She married Robert Moulton Sr. on 29 May 1689, in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 8 September 1737, in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 69, and was buried in Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Smith est née le 17 septembre 1667, à Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Richard Smith, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sarah Chandler, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Moulton Sr. le 29 mai 1689, à Hampton, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 8 septembre 1737, à Hampton, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy Smith am 17. September 1667 in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Smith 23 und ihre Mutter Sarah Chandler 23. Sie hat am 29. Mai 1689 in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Robert Moulton Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 8. September 1737 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America und wurde in Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Smith è nata il il 17 settembre 1667 nel Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Richard Smith, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Sarah Chandler, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Robert Moulton Sr. il 29 maggio 1689, nel Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 8 settembre 1737, nel Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Smithが1667年9月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクハンプトンで生まれた時，父Richard Smithは23歳，母Sarah Chandlerは23歳であった。1689年5月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアハンプトンでRobert Moulton Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1737年9月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアハンプトンで69歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンピン グローブ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살리스버이

ko.Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham: 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴 핀 그로브 세멧리

ko.Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살리스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Smith(이)가 1667년 9월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Smith(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Chandler(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1689년 5월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 함프턴에서 Robert Moulton Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1737년 9월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 함프턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴 핀 그로브 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Smith nasceu em 17 de setembro de 1667, em Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Richard Smith, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Chandler, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Moulton Sr. em 29 de maio de 1689, em Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1737, em Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Smith родилась 17 сентября 1667 г. в местности хамптон, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Richard Smith было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Chandler, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Moulton Sr. 29 мая 1689 г. в местности хамптон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 8 сентября 1737 г. в местности хамптон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности паин гров кеметири, хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy Smith nació el 17 de septiembre de 1667, en Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Richard Smith, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sarah Chandler, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Robert Moulton Sr. el 29 de mayo de 1689, en Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1737, en Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
